reviews.comment:
Precio más altos que en otros Ypf Aca y algo demorado cuando atienden. Pero se entiende porque el público que tiene se toma todo su tiempo para ser atendidos. Si estas apurado busca otra.

(Translated by Google)
Prices are higher than at other YPF stations here, and service is a bit slow. But that's understandable because they have a lot of customers who take their time being served. If you're in a hurry, look elsewhere.

reviewReply.comment: Buen dia, muchas gracias por tu comentario y calificación, estamos trabajando en mejorar la rapidez del servicio, te esperamos nuevamente en YPF ACA Belgrano.

reviews.comment:
Ahora cambio mi calificación porque ayer 09.02.25 fui a inflar gomas y querían cobrar $ 500 cariño, divinos y antes era un servicio gratis. Obvio que salí horrorizado, juraban apenas que cargo nafta.

(Translated by Google)
I'm changing my rating now because yesterday, February 9th, 2025, I went to get my tires inflated and they wanted to charge $500, honey, how wonderful! It used to be a free service. Obviously, I left horrified; they swore I'd barely fill up my tank.

YPF Full is a good alternative to a coffee shop. The coffee is freshly made, and there are pastries and other beverages available. The service is excellent.

reviews.comment:
Desagradable experiencia.  29/01/25 21.55hs
Colaborador de playa apurado, se niega a asistir a inflar los neumáticos, con el argumento: tengo q cerrar caja.
Otro colaborador lo mismo, pegado a la PC.
Otro señor mayor, también se niega.

Cero empatía, cero vocación de servicio. Apuro en cerrar el turno, si.

(Translated by Google)
Unpleasant experience. 01/29/25 9:55 PM
A rushed gas station attendant refused to inflate the tires, saying, "I have to close the register."
Another attendant was the same, glued to his computer.
An older gentleman also refused.

Zero empathy, zero customer service skills. But he was in a hurry to close his shift.
